search.query: | inputlookup bitsight_users.csv | eval joined_epoch=strptime(joined_time,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | eval last_login_epoch=strptime(last_login_time,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%QZ") | eval age_days=round((now()-coalesce(last_login_epoch, joined_epoch))/86400,0) | eval login_status=if(isnull(last_login_epoch),"Never Logged In","Has Logged In") | rex field=roles max_match=1 "^\s*\[\s*\{\s*\"name\"\s*:\s*(?null|\"[^\"]*\")" | eval _first=coalesce(if(first_val="null","", trim(replace(first_val,"^\"|\"$",""))),"") | eval role_name=case( _first="","None", lower(_first)="vrm operations","None", lower(_first)="vrm admin","None", 1=1,_first) | fields - first_val _first | eval age_icon=case( isnull(last_login_epoch) AND age_days<31,"☠️", age_days>1095,"❌", age_days>730,"🚨", age_days>365,"⚠️", 1=1,"ℹ️" )
| where login_status="Never Logged In" | stats count
| stats count by role_name | sort -count role_name

table.title: Dormant Accounts — Days Since Last Login (Counts)

search.query: | table email formal_name role_name age_days age_icon login_status
